## PR Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] Hotfix

## Branching Policy Check

- [ ] My source branch follows naming (`feature/*`, `bugfix/*`, `chore/*`, `hotfix/*`)
- [ ] My target branch is correct (`integration` for normal work, `main` only from `integration` or `hotfix/*`)
- [ ] I understand direct pushes to protected branches are not allowed

## Quality Check

- [ ] Local build passes (`make build-local`)
- [ ] CI checks are green
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior/process changed
